dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system successfully executed the 'rules-context-loader' and 'alignment-engine' steps with zero errors and 100% schema validation success. The high token count in the context-loader (10,084 completion tokens) indicates an exhaustive ingestion of architectural constraints, maintaining the resolution of previous baseline regressions.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' span shows significant analytical depth with 6,234 completion tokens. The successful mapping of work items to architectural evolution states demonstrates robust causal links between engineering tasks and systemic outcomes.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The 'alignment-engine' effectively processed technical requirements against the rule context. While successful, the 'architecture-intent-generator' had a lower relative completion token count (1,231), suggesting a concise resolution of trade-offs rather than an exhaustive multi-path exploration.
